message.content:
@startuml
title System Sequence Diagram: Record vaccine administration

actor Nurse
participant ":System" as System

Nurse -> System : 1 starts recording the administration of a vaccine to a SNS user
System --> Nurse : 2 requests to select the SNS user
Nurse -> System : 3 selects the SNS user
System --> Nurse : 4 shows SNS user information (Name, Age and Adverse Reactions) and ask for confirmation
Nurse -> System : 5 confirms the information
System --> Nurse : 6 requests to select the vaccine to be administered and the lot number
Nurse -> System : 7 selects the vaccine and inputs lot number
System --> Nurse : 8 shows data and request confirmation
Nurse -> System : 9 confirms the data
System --> Nurse : 10 informs operation success and asks if should start the recovery period
Nurse -> System : 11 confirms to start the recovery period
System --> Nurse : 12 after the recovery period, sends SMS message informing the SNS user that he can leave the vaccination center.

@enduml
